tiers.name: Rookie Puzzles
tiers.description: Learn the basics — find checkmate and win material
tiers.rival_intro: Let's see if you can handle the basics. I doubt it.

puzzles.hint: The queen and bishop both target f7. Deliver checkmate!
The f7 pawn is only defended by the king. Your queen has a clear path.
Black weakened the kingside. Bring the queen to h5 for checkmate!
A rook on the back rank can deliver checkmate. Look for Re8.
puzzles.description: Back Rank Mate — Finish the game!

puzzles.hint: White blundered with f3 and g4. Deliver Fool's Mate!
Develop with d3, supporting the center and opening the bishop.
puzzles.description: Solid Development — d3 supports the center!

puzzles.hint: Accept the gambit pawn. Capture on c4.
puzzles.description: Queen's Gambit Accepted — Take the pawn!

puzzles.hint: Capture the d4 pawn in the center. Simplify!
Strike back in the center with e5, gaining space.
Counter in the center with d4. Gain space and open lines.
puzzles.description: Central Pawn — d4 fights for control!

tiers.name: Tactical Strikes
tiers.description: Intermediate tactics — forks, pins, and discoveries
tiers.rival_intro: You made it past the easy ones? Color me surprised. This is where it gets real.

puzzles.hint: A knight to d4 attacks the queen on f3 and forks key squares.
The e4 pawn is no longer defended. Capture it with the knight!
puzzles.description: Central Strike — Win the e4 pawn!

puzzles.hint: Advance the e-pawn to attack the d4 pawn and gain space.
Both bishop and queen aim at f7. Checkmate!
The e5 pawn can be captured. The knight takes it safely.
puzzles.description: Knight Capture — Win the center pawn!

puzzles.hint: The knight can capture e5. The d6 pawn can recapture but you win a pawn.
Capture the e5 pawn to open the center and win material.
Strike the center with d4 to open lines and attack e5.
puzzles.description: Center Break — d4 opens the position!

puzzles.hint: Solidify the center with d3, developing and preparing castling.
Pin the knight to the king with Bb5. A classic Ruy Lopez move!
puzzles.description: The Pin — Bb5 pins the knight!

tiers.name: Master Challenges
tiers.description: Advanced tactics — sacrifices, multi-move sequences, and endgames
tiers.rival_intro: Impressive. But now you face true challenges. Don't embarrass yourself.

puzzles.hint: The e5 pawn looks defended but Nxe5 is a fork! After dxe5, Bxf7+ wins.
puzzles.description: Knight Fork — Win material with a tactic!

puzzles.hint: Advance the knight to g5, threatening Nxf7 and targeting the weak king.
puzzles.description: Knight Pressure — Threaten the weak f7!

puzzles.hint: Queen and bishop combine on f7 for a devastating checkmate!
Sacrifice the bishop on f7 to expose the king, then bring the queen in!
The queen is attacking f7 but the king must escape. Find the only safe square.
The classic Greek Gift! Sacrifice on h7 to open the king.
Another Greek Gift pattern. Bishop sacrifice on h7 followed by Ng5+.
puzzles.description: Sacrifice Attack — Break open the kingside!

puzzles.hint: The Fried Liver starts with Bxf7+. Sacrifice to expose the king!
puzzles.description: Fried Liver — Bishop sacrifice on f7!

puzzles.hint: Force the king to the corner then deliver a crushing blow on h6!
puzzles.description: Crushing Attack — Break down the kingside!

puzzles.hint: The position is critical. Capture the invasive knight with Rxf7, then deal with the queen's recapture.
puzzles.description: Defense Under Fire — Survive the attack!

trial.name: Monster Trial
trial.description: Defeat SPECTRE in a full game. Stockfish at ~1800 ELO.
trial.rival_taunt: So you think you're ready? Come face me, human. Your journey ends here.
